attributes.title: [Envoy Proxy] Overview
attributes.description: Proxy health, downstream traffic, and upstream status at a glance.

params.markdown:
## [Envoy Proxy] Overview

This dashboard provides a health summary for Envoy Proxy:
- Proxy liveness and server state
- Downstream request volume and error rate
- Active connection counts
- Cluster manager status

query.esql:
FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.live IS NOT NULL
| STATS live = MAX(envoy.server.live)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.live IS NOT NULL
| STATS live = MAX(envoy.server.live)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.cluster_manager.active_clusters IS NOT NULL
| STATS clusters = MAX(envoy.cluster_manager.active_clusters)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.cluster_manager.active_clusters IS NOT NULL
| STATS clusters = MAX(envoy.cluster_manager.active_clusters)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_total)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_total)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_active)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_active)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.uptime IS NOT NULL
| STATS uptime = MAX(envoy.server.uptime)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.server.uptime IS NOT NULL
| STATS uptime = MAX(envoy.server.uptime)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_active IS NOT NULL
| STATS listeners = MAX(envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_active)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_active IS NOT NULL
| STATS listeners = MAX(envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_active)

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_total) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_total) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx IS NOT NULL OR envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed IS NOT NULL
| STATS rq_2xx = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx), rq_completed = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx IS NOT NULL OR envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed IS NOT NULL
| STATS rq_2xx = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_2xx), rq_completed = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_rq_completed) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_active IS NOT NULL OR envoy.server.total_connections IS NOT NULL
| STATS downstream_active = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_active), server_total = MAX(envoy.server.total_connections) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_active IS NOT NULL OR envoy.server.total_connections IS NOT NULL
| STATS downstream_active = MAX(envoy.http.ingress_http.downstream_cx_active), server_total = MAX(envoy.server.total_connections) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.cluster_manager.active_clusters IS NOT NULL OR envoy.cluster_manager.warming_clusters IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(envoy.cluster_manager.active_clusters), warming = MAX(envoy.cluster_manager.warming_clusters) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.cluster_manager.active_clusters IS NOT NULL OR envoy.cluster_manager.warming_clusters IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(envoy.cluster_manager.active_clusters), warming = MAX(envoy.cluster_manager.warming_clusters) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC
